meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Greek Yogurt and Whey Protein Bowl
instructions: Mix Greek yogurt and whey protein until smooth.
Top with mixed berries and almonds.
Serve immediately.

swap_options.recipe_title: Cottage Cheese and Whey Protein Bowl
instructions: Mix cottage cheese and whey protein until smooth.
Top with mixed berries and almonds.
Serve immediately.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Egg White Omelette with Spinach and Feta
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add egg whites and cook until partially set.
Add spinach and feta, cook until spinach wilts and egg is fully set.
Fold omelette and serve.

swap_options.recipe_title: Egg White Scramble with Broccoli and Cheddar
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add egg whites and cook until partially set.
Add broccoli and cheddar, cook until broccoli is tender and egg is fully set.
Scramble and serve.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Quinoa and Black Bean Salad with Avocado
instructions: Combine quinoa, black beans, and avocado in a bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.
Toss to combine and serve.

swap_options.recipe_title: Chickpea and Quinoa Salad with Tahini Dressing
instructions: Combine quinoa and chickpeas in a bowl.
Mix tahini, lemon juice, and olive oil to make dressing.
Pour dressing over salad, toss to combine and serve.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Egg White and Spinach Breakfast Wrap
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add egg whites and cook until set, then add spinach and feta.
Place mixture in tortilla, wrap, and serve.

swap_options.recipe_title: Egg White and Cheese Breakfast Burrito
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add egg whites and cook until set, then add cheese.
Place mixture in tortilla, wrap, and serve.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Greek Yogurt and Chickpea Salad
instructions: Combine Greek yogurt, chickpeas, cucumber, and tomato in a bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil and mix well.
Serve chilled.

swap_options.recipe_title: Cottage Cheese and Lentil Salad
instructions: Combine cottage cheese, lentils, cucumber, and tomato in a bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil and mix well.
Serve chilled.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Quinoa and Vegetable Stir-fry with Tofu
instructions: Heat a pan over medium heat and add tofu, cooking until golden.
Add broccoli and carrot, stir-fry until tender.
Add quinoa and soy sauce, stir to combine and heat through.
Serve hot.

swap_options.recipe_title: Brown Rice and Vegetable Stir-fry with Tempeh
instructions: Heat a pan over medium heat and add tempeh, cooking until golden.
Add broccoli and carrot, stir-fry until tender.
Add brown rice and soy sauce, stir to combine and heat through.
Serve hot.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Oatmeal with Egg Whites and Berries
instructions: Cook oats according to package instructions.
Whisk egg whites and fold into cooked oats, stirring until set.
Top with mixed berries and almonds.
Serve warm.

swap_options.recipe_title: Quinoa Porridge with Egg Whites and Berries
instructions: Cook quinoa according to package instructions.
Whisk egg whites and fold into cooked quinoa, stirring until set.
Top with mixed berries and almonds.
Serve warm.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Cottage Cheese and Avocado Toast
instructions: Toast bread slices.
Spread cottage cheese on toast.
Top with avocado slices and tomato.
Serve immediately.

swap_options.recipe_title: Greek Yogurt and Avocado Toast
instructions: Toast bread slices.
Spread Greek yogurt on toast.
Top with avocado slices and tomato.
Serve immediately.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Lentil and Vegetable Curry with Rice
instructions: Cook rice according to package instructions.
In a pot, combine lentils, carrot, broccoli, and coconut milk.
Simmer until vegetables are tender.
Serve curry over rice.

swap_options.recipe_title: Chickpea and Vegetable Curry with Quinoa
instructions: Cook quinoa according to package instructions.
In a pot, combine chickpeas, carrot, broccoli, and coconut milk.
Simmer until vegetables are tender.
Serve curry over quinoa.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Protein Pancakes with Greek Yogurt
instructions: Blend oats, whey protein, and egg whites to form a batter.
Cook pancakes on a non-stick skillet over medium heat until golden.
Serve with Greek yogurt and honey drizzled on top.

swap_options.recipe_title: Protein Waffles with Greek Yogurt
instructions: Blend oats, whey protein, and egg whites to form a batter.
Cook waffles in a waffle iron until golden.
Serve with Greek yogurt and honey drizzled on top.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Chickpea and Avocado Salad with Cottage Cheese
instructions: Combine chickpeas, avocado, and tomato in a bowl.
Add cottage cheese and drizzle with olive oil.
Mix well and serve.

swap_options.recipe_title: Black Bean and Avocado Salad with Greek Yogurt
instructions: Combine black beans, avocado, and tomato in a bowl.
Add Greek yogurt and drizzle with olive oil.
Mix well and serve.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Tofu Stir-fry with Brown Rice
instructions: Heat a pan over medium heat and add tofu, cooking until golden.
Add broccoli and carrot, stir-fry until tender.
Add brown rice and soy sauce, stir to combine and heat through.
Serve hot.

swap_options.recipe_title: Tempeh Stir-fry with Quinoa
instructions: Heat a pan over medium heat and add tempeh, cooking until golden.
Add broccoli and carrot, stir-fry until tender.
Add quinoa and soy sauce, stir to combine and heat through.
Serve hot.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Egg White and Cheese Breakfast Sandwich
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Cook egg whites until set.
Assemble sandwich with bread, cheese, tomato, and cooked egg whites.
Serve warm.

swap_options.recipe_title: Egg White and Avocado Breakfast Sandwich
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Cook egg whites until set.
Assemble sandwich with bread, avocado, tomato, and cooked egg whites.
Serve warm.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Greek Yogurt and Lentil Salad
instructions: Combine Greek yogurt, lentils, cucumber, and tomato in a bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil and mix well.
Serve chilled.

swap_options.recipe_title: Cottage Cheese and Chickpea Salad
instructions: Combine cottage cheese, chickpeas, cucumber, and tomato in a bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil and mix well.
Serve chilled.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Vegetable Stir-fry with Tofu and Quinoa
instructions: Heat a pan over medium heat and add tofu, cooking until golden.
Add broccoli and carrot, stir-fry until tender.
Add quinoa and soy sauce, stir to combine and heat through.
Serve hot.

swap_options.recipe_title: Tempeh Stir-fry with Brown Rice
instructions: Heat a pan over medium heat and add tempeh, cooking until golden.
Add broccoli and carrot, stir-fry until tender.
Add brown rice and soy sauce, stir to combine and heat through.
Serve hot.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Protein Smoothie Bowl
instructions: Blend whey protein, banana, and almond milk until smooth.
Pour into a bowl and top with mixed berries and almonds.
Serve immediately.

swap_options.recipe_title: Greek Yogurt Smoothie Bowl
instructions: Blend Greek yogurt, banana, and almond milk until smooth.
Pour into a bowl and top with mixed berries and almonds.
Serve immediately.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Egg White and Veggie Wrap
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add egg whites and cook until set, then add spinach and feta.
Place mixture in tortilla, wrap, and serve.

swap_options.recipe_title: Egg White and Cheese Wrap
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add egg whites and cook until set, then add cheese.
Place mixture in tortilla, wrap, and serve.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Chickpea and Quinoa Salad with Avocado
instructions: Combine chickpeas, quinoa, avocado, and tomato in a bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil and mix well.
Serve chilled.

swap_options.recipe_title: Black Bean and Quinoa Salad with Avocado
instructions: Combine black beans, quinoa, avocado, and tomato in a bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil and mix well.
Serve chilled.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Egg White and Spinach Omelette
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add egg whites and cook until partially set.
Add spinach and feta, cook until spinach wilts and egg is fully set.
Serve with whole wheat bread.

swap_options.recipe_title: Egg White and Cheese Omelette
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add egg whites and cook until partially set.
Add cheddar, cook until cheese melts and egg is fully set.
Serve with whole wheat bread.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Greek Yogurt and Berry Parfait
instructions: Layer Greek yogurt, mixed berries, and granola in a glass.
Drizzle honey on top.
Serve chilled.

swap_options.recipe_title: Cottage Cheese and Berry Parfait
instructions: Layer cottage cheese, mixed berries, and granola in a glass.
Drizzle honey on top.
Serve chilled.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Lentil and Vegetable Stew with Rice
instructions: In a pot, combine lentils, carrot, broccoli, and tomato paste.
Simmer until vegetables are tender.
Serve stew over rice.

swap_options.recipe_title: Chickpea and Vegetable Stew with Quinoa
instructions: In a pot, combine chickpeas, carrot, broccoli, and tomato paste.
Simmer until vegetables are tender.
Serve stew over quinoa.
